TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sapiseking_nu_kamu_nu_binacadan, title = sapiseking_nu_kamu_nu_binacadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sapiseking_nu_kamu_nu_binacadan} }

S.FORM: sapiseking nu kamu nu binacadan (kamu nu Hulam: śóŹŤ™ěŤ™ćŤ≠ČŤÄÉŤ©¶) sakay binacadanay nikaawasan tu talakaway a seking .
S.PHON: sapis…ôkiŇč nu kamu nu bina ¶adan (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ******) sakaj bina ¶adanaj nikaawasan tu tar~…ĺakawaj a s…ôkiŇč .
